title: Opendoor Technologies Inc (OPEN) Q4 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Navigating Growth Amidst Market Headwinds
text: Opendoor reported mixed results for Q4 2024. The company achieved Q4 revenue of $1.1 billion, representing 25% year-over-year growth. However, full-year 2024 revenue declined to $5.2 billion from $6.9 billion in 2023. On a positive note, the contribution margin improved significantly to 4.7% for the full year 2024, compared to negative 3.7% in 2023. The company reduced adjusted EBITDA losses by $500 million year-over-year, with full-year losses of $142 million versus $627 million previously. Home acquisitions showed strong momentum, with 14,684 homes purchased in 2024, up 31% from the prior year. The company ended the year with $2.2 billion in net inventory, up 22% year-over-year, and maintained $1.1 billion in total capital, including $679 million in unrestricted cash. Management noted that clearance rates for homes are pacing 25% lower than the previous year, while visits to new listings declined 20-25% and delistings reached decade highs. For Q1 2025, Opendoor projects revenue between $1.0 billion and $1.075 billion with contribution profit guidance of $40-50 million and plans to acquire over 3,500 homes.
